checks.label: Align the source title, H1, and meta description more closely
checks.instruction: Keep the source title, first H1, and meta description focused on the same primary topic so crawlers receive one coherent page summary.
checks.detail: The source title and first source H1 do not share meaningful topic terms.
checks.selector: head > title, body h1, head > meta[name="description"]

checks.label: Complete the Open Graph sharing fields in source HTML
checks.instruction: Fill in the missing Open Graph fields in the HTML response before rendering so link previews have a more complete source of truth.
checks.detail: Missing image in source HTML.

checks.label: Remove noarchive if cached search snippets are desired
checks.instruction: Remove the noarchive directive from source HTML or headers if this page should allow cached copies in search experiences.
checks.detail: The effective robots directives for all include noarchive.

checks.label: Rendered DOM comparison was unavailable
checks.instruction: We could not complete the rendered DOM comparison for this page, so these findings rely on the HTML response before rendering.
checks.detail: The rendered DOM pass did not capture comparable signals.

checks.label: Page title is present
checks.detail: The HTML response before rendering includes a descriptive title element.

checks.label: Meta description is present
checks.detail: The HTML response before rendering includes a summary snippet for this page.

checks.label: Source HTML includes visible text
checks.detail: The HTML response before rendering already includes visible body text.

checks.label: Primary heading is present
checks.detail: The source HTML before rendering includes a primary heading.

checks.label: Title length is in a healthy range
checks.detail: The source title length is within the preferred range for this audit.

checks.label: Heading structure is orderly
checks.detail: The source HTML exposes one primary H1 without skipped heading levels.

checks.label: Content depth is sufficient
checks.detail: The source HTML before rendering includes enough body copy to explain the topic.

checks.label: Meta description length is in a healthy range
checks.detail: The source meta description length is within the preferred range for this audit.

checks.label: Robots directives are internally consistent
checks.detail: No same-target robots directive conflicts were detected across HTML and HTTP surfaces.

checks.label: Heading outline quality is clean
checks.detail: The source HTML heading outline starts correctly, uses non-empty text, and avoids repeated heading labels.
checks.selector: body h1, body h2, body h3, body h4, body h5, body h6

checks.label: Robots directives allow indexing
checks.detail: The effective robots directives do not block indexing for the evaluated crawler.

checks.label: Eligible body images include alt text
checks.detail: Eligible body images in the source HTML before rendering include alt text.

checks.label: Preview directives are not restrictive
checks.detail: The effective robots preview directives do not restrict snippet or image/video preview behavior in this pass.

checks.label: Robots directives allow translation support
checks.detail: The effective robots directives do not include notranslate for the evaluated crawler.

checks.label: Robots directives use supported tokens
checks.detail: The audit did not detect unsupported or malformed robots directive tokens.

checks.label: Social preview URLs are explicit and usable
checks.detail: Present social preview URL fields use absolute HTTP(S) URLs in source HTML.
checks.selector: head > meta[property="og:url"], head > meta[property="og:image"], head > meta[name="twitter:image"]

checks.label: Canonical signals are structurally clear
checks.detail: The page does not expose duplicate or conflicting canonical declarations across tracked surfaces.

checks.label: No source meta refresh redirect was detected
checks.detail: The source HTML did not expose meta refresh tags that redirect or auto-refresh the page.

checks.label: Viewport meta tag is mobile-friendly
checks.detail: The source HTML declares a mobile-friendly viewport configuration.

checks.label: Canonical target aligns with the final page URL
checks.detail: The canonical target resolves to the final page URL.

checks.label: Canonical target resolves to this page
checks.detail: The canonical target resolves to the current final page URL, so no separate target health issue was detected here.

checks.label: A favicon or app icon is declared
checks.detail: The source HTML declares at least one favicon or app icon link.

checks.label: robots.txt allows crawling this URL
checks.detail: The evaluated robots.txt rules allow this URL to be crawled.

checks.label: Alternate language annotations are consistent
checks.detail: Detected hreflang annotations without invalid targets or cross-surface conflicts.

checks.label: Head metadata does not contain harmful duplicates
checks.detail: The source head did not expose duplicate title, meta description, viewport, or social tags that this audit tracks.

checks.label: Redirect chain resolves cleanly
checks.detail: The requested URL resolves to the final page in 1 redirect.

checks.label: Source HTML includes crawlable internal links
checks.detail: The HTML response before rendering exposes at least one same-origin crawlable link.

checks.label: Internal discovery links are not blocked by rel attributes
checks.detail: Internal crawlable links are not marked with rel values that can suppress discovery.

checks.label: Internal link coverage is sufficient
checks.detail: The source HTML exposes a healthy number of same-origin crawlable links for this page length.

checks.label: Anchor text is descriptive
checks.detail: The source HTML before rendering uses descriptive anchor text for crawlable links.

checks.label: Source routes use crawlable URLs
checks.detail: The source HTML before rendering uses crawlable URLs for navigational links.

checks.label: HTML language is declared
checks.detail: The HTML response before rendering declares its document language.

checks.label: HTML response is reachable
checks.detail: The page returned a successful HTML response that crawlers can read before rendering.

checks.label: No source structured data was detected
checks.instruction: If this page should be eligible for rich results, add valid structured data in source HTML that matches the visible page content.
checks.detail: No structured data was detected in the HTML response before rendering. This is optional for general pages and can be added later when the page qualifies for rich results.

checks.label: No JSON-LD blocks need validation
checks.instruction: If this page is intended for rich results, a healthy setup includes parseable JSON-LD blocks with @context and @type in source HTML.
checks.detail: The source HTML did not expose JSON-LD blocks to validate in this pass.
